summary: Excellent spring‑90 show featuring a killer Slipknot! and Killer Queen, with a well‑tapped recording that fans love
review: Both reviewers rave about this early‑May‑1990 set, highlighting the return of Bob Weir to Rhode Island and praising the Slipknot! segue as well as the Killer Queen cover. The taping/transfer is appreciated, indicating a clean, listenable source despite no explicit technical details.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5‑star ratings and focus on strong performance highlights with no complaints about the audio, indicating a top‑tier show and solid recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers thank the taper/transfer, implying clear and enjoyable sound despite lack of explicit technical commentary.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; reviewers simply note the excitement of the spring‑90 material and the Slipknot! moment.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer notes “any Phil and friends,” indicating a positive vibe around Phil’s presence.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bob Weir’s return to Rhode Island is celebrated in the review.
